calendar.matters:
Motion For Clarification Of Decree Changing Name And Order Recognizing Change Of Gender And For Issuance Of New Birth Certificate
Off Calendar Apr-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of gender of Petitioner Erza David Hanson.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;

Petitioner Ezra David Hanson appeared via zoom. Attorney Sunny Daring appeared in court.

Petition for change of name and gender filed Feb 12, 2022.

Order to show cause filed Feb 25, 2022.

Motion for Clarification of Decree Changing Name and Order Recognizing Change of Gender and for new issues of birth certificate filed Feb 20, 2025.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony and there are no objections filed, The Court grants Petitioner's request for gender.

Order Recognizing change of gender and sex identifier and for issuance of new certificates signed and filed this day.
